title: Boerpannekoek with Cinnamon Sugar
excerpt: A thin, soft boerpannekoek batter with a splash of vinegar and 30 minutes' rest as the secret — sprinkled with cinnamon sugar, rolled up and served warm.

seo.title: Boerpannekoek with Cinnamon Sugar - Marinda Kook
seo.description: An easy boerpannekoek recipe with cinnamon sugar — thin, soft pancakes thanks to a splash of vinegar and 30 minutes' resting time. Perfect for a rainy Sunday afternoon.

html: Nothing says a rainy Sunday afternoon like a stack of warm boerpannekoek with cinnamon sugar. This batter is my mother's — the splash of vinegar makes them thin and soft, and the 30 minutes' rest is the secret.

steps: Sift the cake flour and salt together in a large mixing bowl.
Whisk the eggs, milk, water and oil together and gradually mix into the dry ingredients until smooth.
Stir in the vinegar last and let the batter rest for about 30 minutes.
Heat a little oil in a pan and pour in a thin layer of batter; swirl the pan so it spreads evenly.
Cook until the edges come loose, flip, and cook the other side lightly.
Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar, roll up and serve warm.
